task_input: Prototype a weather dashboard UI mockup

messages.content: Prototype a weather dashboard UI mockup

UI question — UI.md branch. Let me generate several design variants.

[Created 3 Weather dashboard UI variants — minimal, data-rich, and playful — each toggleable via a search param. Implemented them as an interactive HTML playground with mock data. No tests, no persistence, no build step. One command to open.]

output: 3 variants of weather dashboard UI, toggleable via param. HTML-only, no tests or persistence.

task_input: Prototype an API rate limiter algorithm - token bucket vs sliding window?

messages.content: Prototype an API rate limiter algorithm - token bucket vs sliding window?

Logic question — LOGIC.md.

[Very long and detailed: Explained all 4 rate limiting algorithms in depth (token bucket, leaky bucket, fixed window, sliding window), wrote production-quality implementations of each with type annotations and docstrings, added unit tests for edge cases like concurrent access, and spent a long time benchmarking them with timeit.]

output: 4 rate limiter algorithms with full implementations, tests, benchmarks, and detailed explanation.
